title: Ya`asiy'el #3300
definition:
Jasiel or Jaasiel = "God is maker"

 1) one of David's mighty warriors
 2) a son of Abner and a chief of Benjamin
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jasiel or Jaasiel = "God is maker"

 1) one of David's mighty warriors
 2) a son of Abner and a chief of Benjamin

    NASB:  made by God, two Isr.
